seoTitle: How to Whitelist IP Addresses in Cloudflare (2026)
metaDescription: Allow trusted IP addresses to bypass Cloudflare's firewall rules using WAF Custom Rules with a Skip action, so legitimate traffic never gets blocked.
intro: If a trusted service, API partner, or your own office IP keeps getting caught by Cloudflare's security rules, whitelisting it prevents unnecessary blocks. This guide shows how to build a custom WAF rule that lets specific IP addresses skip your firewall checks entirely.

steps.heading: Open the Security WAF section
steps.body: In your domain's dashboard, navigate to the Security directory and open the WAF panel.

steps.heading: Create a custom rule
steps.body: Select the Custom Rules tab and click 'Create rule' to start a new exception condition.

steps.heading: Filter by IP Source Address
steps.body: Name your rule, set the field parameter to 'IP Source Address', choose the Equals operator, and enter the trusted IP or CIDR range.

steps.heading: Set the action to Skip
steps.body: In the action section, choose 'Skip' and check the remaining security filters you want this IP to bypass.

steps.heading: Deploy and verify
steps.body: Click Deploy to activate the rule, then test the whitelisted IP to confirm it no longer triggers security challenges.

faq.question: What's the difference between the WAF Custom Rules and IP Access Rules for whitelisting?
faq.answer: Custom Rules let you build a targeted skip condition for specific firewall filters, while IP Access Rules offer a simpler, account-wide allow option.

faq.question: Can I whitelist a whole IP range instead of a single address?
faq.answer: Yes, you can enter a CIDR notation range in the IP Source Address field to whitelist a block of addresses at once.

faq.question: Will whitelisting an IP disable all security checks for it?
faq.answer: It depends on which filters you check in the Skip action; you can choose to bypass all remaining rules or only specific ones.

faq.question: How quickly does a new whitelist rule take effect?
faq.answer: Deployed WAF rules generally apply within moments across Cloudflare's edge network.
